hypothesis.H1: Windowed+floor Δ_freq within 0.05 of Δ_pos for SYK-near heads.
hypothesis.H2: Floor subtraction contributes ≥ 0.03 to Δ_freq beyond windowing alone.
hypothesis.H0: Gap persists ≥ 0.10 even after windowing+floor — spectral measures differ.

conditions: raw: no windowing, no floor (replicates exp-045)
windowed+floor: floor subtraction then Hanning then DFT
